app.name: GuardiaBox
app.tagline: Local secure vault. Encrypt, store, and share files without ever trusting a remote server.

lock.title: Vault locked
lock.subtitle: Enter the administrator password to unlock the vault.
lock.init_subtitle: Pick a strong administrator password. It cannot be recovered.
lock.init_acknowledgement: I understand this password cannot be recovered. Losing the password means losing the vault permanently.
lock.auth_failure_constant: Wrong administrator password or vault not initialised.
lock.init_success: Vault initialised. You can now unlock it.

empty.title: No user
empty.subtitle: Create your first user to get started.

encrypt.title: Encrypt a file
encrypt.kdf_argon2id: Argon2id (m=64 MiB, t=3, p=1, OWASP 2026 recommendation)

decrypt.title: Decrypt a file
decrypt.anti_oracle_failure: Decryption failed. Wrong password or tampered container.
decrypt.info_anti_oracle: The error message is intentionally uniform to prevent any decryption oracle.
decrypt.invalid_container: Invalid container. The file is not a valid .crypt.
decrypt.unsupported_version: Unsupported container version. The file may come from a newer build.

share.title: Share a .crypt
share.force_label: Overwrite output file if it exists
share.fingerprint_warning: Verify this fingerprint out-of-band (phone, in person) with the recipient before continuing. A different fingerprint indicates a local user-database compromise.

history.title: Audit log
history.empty: No audit entries match the selected filters.

users.title: Users
users.delete_confirm_subtitle: This action removes the RSA keystore and the vault key. Already-shared .gbox-share tokens to this recipient become unreadable.

settings.title: Settings
settings.config_set_hint: To change these values, use GUARDIABOX_… environment variables or a .env file (writing them back is deferred post-MVP).

errors.session_required: Invalid session. Please reconnect to the vault.
errors.session_expired: Session expired. Please reconnect to the vault.
errors.rate_limited: Too many attempts. Wait before retrying.
errors.network: Network error. Is the local sidecar running?
errors.sidecar_server: The sidecar hit an internal error. Check the logs and restart GuardiaBox if the issue persists.
errors.unknown: Unexpected error. Retry or restart GuardiaBox.
errors.weak_password: Password too weak (minimum 12 characters + zxcvbn score ≥ 3).

sidecar.handshake: The local sidecar did not respond within 10 seconds.
sidecar.handshake_hint: Restart GuardiaBox. If the issue persists, check %TEMP%/guardiabox-sidecar.log (with GUARDIABOX_DEBUG_LOG=1 set).
sidecar.fetch: Lost connection to the sidecar. Was the process killed or blocked by antivirus?
sidecar.fetch_hint: Verify GuardiaBox.exe is running in Task Manager. Whitelist it in your antivirus if needed.
sidecar.timeout: The request timed out. The sidecar may be busy (long encryption in progress).
sidecar.timeout_hint: Wait a few seconds and retry. Large files may exceed the default request timeout.
